Implementation Plan – Shark Unlock Digital Revamp & Bilingual Portal

This document outlines the structured technical implementation plan to consolidate and revamp Shark Unlock's digital presence. By leveraging a unified visual identity and a clever "Parallel Page Routing" system inside a single Zoho Sites subscription, we will eliminate multi-domain fragmentation, slash overhead costs, and maximize conversion rates for local North Jersey search traffic.

> [!NOTE]

> Current Build Status:

> * Stage 1: Logging In & Launching the Zoho Sites Site Builder — COMPLETED

> * Stage 2: Accessing the Design Panel, Global Colors, and Fonts Settings — COMPLETED

> * Stage 3: Building the Custom Bilingual Navigation Headers — IN PROGRESS

---

User Review Required

IMPORTANT: Domain Consolidation (DNS Forwarding):

> Instead of paying for two separate Zoho Sites subscriptions, we will consolidate all hosting under `sharkunlock.com`. We will configure the second domain `comenzarseguro.com` at the domain registrar level (e.g., GoDaddy, Namecheap) to automatically forward all traffic to the Spanish landing page `sharkunlock.com/es`. This preserves domain authority, simplifies updates, and saves on recurring monthly hosting fees.

TIP: Streamlined Lead Funnel:

> To eliminate form abandonment, the revamped homepage intake form will only collect essential verification parameters. High-friction documents (like VIN, License Plate, and Driver's License scans) will be deferred to a post-submission secondary onboarding workflow in Zoho CRM, increasing immediate digital lead capture by an estimated 30–40%.

---

Proposed Changes

We will build the entire bilingual system inside a single Zoho Sites account, organizing pages into a parallel relative path structure.



ENGLISH ROOT PATH (/)                             SPANISH ROOT PATH (/es)


├── / (Home)                                      ├── /es (Inicio)


├── /devices-and-training (WR3 Handset & Video)   ├── /es-dispositivo-y-capacitacion


├── /resources (Blog SEO Feed)                    ├── /es-recursos


└── /contact (Say Hello)                          └── /es-contacto
---

Component 1: Global Branding & Design System

  • Typography: authorative, high-readability geometric sans-serif Inter or Roboto for all heading blocks; Open Sans or browser-native sans-serif for body copy.
  • Color Palette (Premium, Sleek Trust):

    • * *Primary Structure:* Slate / Dark Navy Blue (`#0f172a` or HSL Dark Slate) for headers, hero overlays, and footer sections.

    * *Secondary Structure:* Pure white (`#ffffff`) and soft off-white grids (`#f8fafc`) for clean reading separation.

    * *Accent CTA Color:* High-contrast Amber/Burnt Orange (`#ea580c` or `#d97706`) reserved exclusively for active buttons, submission hooks, and clickable links.

  • Aesthetics: Modern cards with subtle box-shadows, soft hover transitions, and professional micro-animations.
    • ---

    Component 2: Unified Navigation & Global Header

  • Logo Layout (Far Left): Minimalist typography icon reading "Shark Unlock" (or a stylized corporate logo).
  • English Header Menu:

    • 1. `Home` (points to `/`)

    2. `Devices & Training` (points to `/devices-and-training`)

    3. `Resources` (points to `/resources`)

    4. `Contact Us` (points to `/contact`)

  • Spanish Header Menu:

    • 1. `Inicio` (points to `/es`)

    2. `Dispositivo y Capacitación` (points to `/es-dispositivo-y-capacitacion`)

    3. `Recursos` (points to `/es-recursos`)

    4. `Contáctenos` (points to `/es-contacto`)

  • Language Switcher:

    • * On all English pages, a highly visible header link reads `Español` and points directly to the Spanish Home page `/es`.

    * On all Spanish pages, a highly visible header link reads `English` and points directly back to the root path `/`.

    ---

    Component 3: Above-the-Fold Hero Section

  • Visual Canvas: Contextual background image representing a clean, professional vehicle interior or a driver safely operating the WR3 device (clutter-free, professional feel).
  • Headline Copy (English): H1: `LOCAL IGNITION INTERLOCK INSTALLATIONS`

    • * *Subheadline:* "Certified, Reliable Service in North Jersey to Regain Your License Safely."

    * *Trust Checkmarks:* `✓ Same-Day Appointments` | `✓ 100% NJ MVC Compliant` | `✓ Easiest Single-Blow Device`

  • Headline Copy (Spanish): H1: `INSTALACIÓN LOCAL DE ALCOHÓLIMETROS DE ENCENDIDO`

    • * *Subheadline:* "Servicio certificado y confiable en el norte de Nueva Jersey para recuperar su licencia de forma segura."

    * *Trust Checkmarks:* `✓ Citas el Mismo Día` | `✓ 100% Cumplimiento NJ MVC` | `✓ Sistema Fácil de Un Solo Soplo`

    ---

    Component 4: Local Service Center Grid (Local SEO Boost)

    To target high-intent local search traffic and combat competitor encroachment, we will design an interactive locations grid displaying the five physical New Jersey service centers.

  • Layout: Flexible responsive grid (3-column on desktop, stacking on mobile) displaying detailed cards with integrated Google Maps embeds and route directions.
  • Service Locations Details:

    • 1. Passaic Service Center:

    * *Address:* 105 Columbia Ave, Passaic, NJ 07055, United States

    2. Monmouth Junction Service Center:

    * *Address:* 2140 US-130 N, Monmouth Junction, NJ 08852, United States

    3. Toms River Service Center:

    * *Address:* 2133 Lakewood Rd, Unit 101, Toms River, NJ 08755, United States

    4. Little Falls Service Center:

    * *Address:* 325 Main St, Little Falls, NJ 07424, United States

    5. Jersey City Service Center:

    * *Address:* 777 Communipaw Ave, Jersey City, NJ 07304, United States

    ---

    Component 5: Streamlined Intake Form Engine

  • Methodology: Embed the optimized Zoho Forms responsive widget using a Zoho Sites HTML/Code Snippet component.
  • Form Flow: Styled as a clean, conversational multi-step wizard:

    • * *Step 1:* Service Location & Language preference (Paterson vs. Passaic storefronts).

    * *Step 2:* Contact details (Validated Phone & Email to ensure clean CRM data).

    * *Step 3:* Basic Vehicle Information (Year, Make, Model, and Ignition Type: Key vs. Push Button).

  • CRM Integration: Submissions instantly inject structured lead entries into the Zoho CRM Leads module, triggering immediate staff notification and subsequent onboarding sequences.
    • ---

    Component 6: Device Training & Resources

  • Training Module: A clean three-column layout featuring:

    • 1. *Instructional Video:* Embedded WR3 handset video demonstration player.

    2. *Simple Steps:* Bullets explaining the easy straight-blow sequence.

    3. *Troubleshooting Check:* Clear answers to prevent common error lockouts.

  • Resource Hub (Blog Feed): A dynamic grid component pulling localized keyword articles from the Zoho Blog subpage `/resources` (e.g. "New Jersey DUI Interlock Laws Guide", "Managing Your WR3 Breathalyzer Device").
    • ---

    Component 7: High-Impact Footer

  • Site Directory: Navigation links mapped by language.
  • Unified Support Hotline: Display the corporate hotline `855-917-4275` (`1-855-91SHARK`) prominently. Calling this line triggers the 3CX Phone System's automated IVR to segment English and Spanish callers.
  • NAPs (Name, Address, Phone): Complete text-based records of all 5 physical facilities (Passaic, Monmouth Junction, Toms River, Little Falls, Jersey City) to maximize Google local search scraping and map matching.
  • Badges: Certified NJ MVC Ignition Interlock Vendor logos.
    • ---

    Component 8: Contact Us Page (`/contact` / `/es-contacto`)

    To provide a dedicated support hub and solidify our 5-location Local SEO footprints, we will configure a highly structured contact page.

  • Left Column (5-Location NAP Directories): Group clear, high-readability text cards for Passaic, Monmouth Junction, Toms River, Little Falls, and Jersey City detailing their exact physical addresses, local routing numbers, and operational hours.
  • Right Column (Direct Support Form): Integrate a clean, vertical Zoho Forms contact widget:

    • * *Fields:* Full Name, Email Address, Phone Number, and a multi-line "How Can We Help?" text area.

    * *Action:* Prominent amber `[Send Message]` submit button.

  • CRM Integration: Successful contact submissions are routed straight to your Zoho CRM or Zoho Desk support queue for immediate team followup.
    • ---

    Verification Plan

    Manual Verification

    1. Link Path Verification: Validate that clicking "Español" in the header dynamically routes to the `/es` path, and "English" routes back to `/`.

    2. Navigation Validation: Confirm that the navigation menus function seamlessly on desktop and mobile viewports, loading the correct relative paths.

    3. Responsiveness Check: Test the custom multi-step intake form inside various mobile frames to ensure seamless spacing, readability, and form submittal without visual cutoff.

    4. CRM Synced Entries: Execute mock form submissions and verify that new records successfully populate the Zoho CRM Leads module with all captured fields (Make, Model, Phone, Location selection).

    Prepared by Robert — Lead Technology Consultant
